span.p:
Changed Boundary 1
Exam Lifecycle API
join, preflight, waiting, start, heartbeat, submit

div.style: color: rgb(17, 24, 39) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Changed Boundary 2
Assessment API
grade trigger, report read, summary read

div.style: color: rgb(17, 24, 39) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Changed Boundary 3
Content API
upload, extract, material registration

div.style: color: rgb(17, 24, 39) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Changed Boundary 4
Identity/Auth Adapter
Clerk + admin authorization

div.style: color: rgb(17, 24, 39) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Changed Boundary 5
RAG Worker
chunk, embed, material indexing

div.style: color: rgb(17, 24, 39) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Changed Boundary 6
Grading Worker
auto-grade, summary, finalization
